title: Random Hotbar
description: Every Time you jump, your hotbar gets replaced
body:
# Random Hotbar
When you jump, your Hotbar gets random Items. It can be everything Minecraft has to offer. Thats basically it :=)

## Help
When you have any Idea for this Mod or just want to help me improve the User Experience, then feel free to help me via Github for example.
